title: Gymnopteris subquinquefida
taxonomy: Gymnopteris subquinquefida is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to South America and is a type of epiphytic or terrestrial fern. The classification of Gymnopteris subquinquefida includes the rank of family, where it falls under the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. Gymnopteris subquinquefida is also classified under the kingdom Plantae and the division Pteridophyta. Further classification includes the genus Gymnopteris, which is a group of ferns within the Blechnaceae family.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin conditions.
